chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1796 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2025 Mr. Toseef Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. == Learned counsel for the petitioners, under the instructions, does not press this petition as the purpose has been served. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
